summary: Phase 4 - Settings & Configuration Deep Audit COMPLETE. All 14 settings modules verified successfully (100% success rate). Each module renders correctly with expected content. Organization Settings with all 6 tabs (General, Team, Operations, Finance, EFI, Integrations) verified - all clickable and load content correctly. Note: Frontend routes do NOT use /settings/* prefix - they use root-level paths like /organization-settings, /subscription, /taxes, etc.
critical_code_review_comments: IMPORTANT: Settings routes use ROOT-LEVEL paths, not /settings/* prefixed paths. Previous test report (iteration_139) mentioned /settings/* paths which are incorrect and return 404.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (20/20 items tested - 14 settings pages + 6 org tabs)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 settings modules verified. CRITICAL: Use ROOT-LEVEL routes not /settings/* prefixed paths. Correct routes: /all-settings (All Settings), /organization-settings (Org Settings), /subscription, /taxes, /branding, /zoho-sync, /exchange-rates, /custom-modules, /invoice-settings, /activity-logs, /data-management, /data-migration, /settings (Profile). Organization Settings tabs (General, Team, Operations, Finance, EFI, Integrations) all work correctly.

main_settings_pages.login: PASSED - Login successful with demo credentials
main_settings_pages.zoho_sync: PASSED - Route: /zoho-sync (shows not configured status as expected)

organization_settings_tabs.general_tab: PASSED - Shows org profile (name, email, phone, GSTIN, address)
organization_settings_tabs.operations_tab: PASSED - Shows Ticket, Inventory, SLA settings
organization_settings_tabs.finance_tab: PASSED - Shows Razorpay, Payment, GST configurations
organization_settings_tabs.integrations_tab: PASSED - Shows WhatsApp integration (Not Configured status)

mocked_apis_note: Zoho Sync endpoints are stubbed (returns not_configured status). This is expected behavior - Zoho Books is not actually connected.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. Initial test failures were due to incorrect route paths (/settings/* vs root-level paths like /organization-settings).
